sources: README Names and World Overview (supplementary + bios/descriptions)

entries.name: Melvin
entries.bio: Newly hired labourer at Derriere's Factory. Worried about losing his job. Male.

entries.name: Wedgie
entries.bio: Longterm worker at Derrerie's Factory. Smokes. Thinks most people are 'idiots'. Does the bare minimum. Female.

entries.name: Bad Ass
entries.bio:
A radical that wants to be left alone

Pessimistic Edgy Philosophical and Political

Is actually a Human who was turned into a donkey by the Gods by accident. (see Cole Butte below)
entries.dialogueStyle: Critical theory, philosophical, generally contemporary jaded leftist

entries.name: Big Ass
entries.bio: Always sees the big picture or puts things into perspective. Yearns for bigger opportunity and responsibility; wants to make an impact.
entries.dialogueStyle: references to size: massive, impressive, significant, make an impact

entries.name: Child Joey Kulan
entries.bio: A small boy who is also a great artist. He visits the Fannyside Farm to see the donkeys with his grandmother. Every year he plays baby Jesus in the nativity play in the Bumpkin church. He is killed in the fire of Ep2.

entries.name: Cole Butte  ColeMachine
entries.bio: Always a rebel and a bit jaded by being left behind by his mother at a young age. A robotics-wiz, he dreamed of going to Mecha City to make a difference in the world through science. He was forced to work in the mine after graduating. Became depressed after his father wasted his scholarship money. In the cave-in, he tries to save Lazy and when Lazy tries to 'send' herself, Cole's soul is sent to the Astral Plane, only to be rejected and return to his body, ultimately and mysteriously, transforming his body into that of a donkey.

entries.name: Foal named by audience
entries.bio: Born after the fire in Episode 2, she has never known a world of Humans. She just wants to play. She's very naive.
entries.dialogueStyle:
"Whoppee!" "WHOA" "UGH"  

What if I want to play?

entries.name: Grandma Kulan
entries.bio: An old woman who looks after her grandson. She thinks donkeys have no souls and are stupid. After Joey dies in Ep2, she becomes sad and cherishes her memories of their last afternoon visiting donkeys by going to the Zoo, or going to the Circus. Easter Egg: If the Circus, she ultimately gets a job as a janitor at Derriere's Factory as a way to keep herself busy.

entries.name: Hard Ass
entries.bio: Strong, stoic, and blunt. Willing to make sacrifices to protect the herd.

entries.name: Hugh G Butte
entries.bio: Alcoholic Mine boss. His diaries in Ep3 reveal his struggle to keep the Mine alive and his poor management skills. He used Cole's university scholarship money to buy a Boring Machine in an attempt to save the business. He is killed in Ep2 by Hard Ass.

entries.name: Kick Ass
entries.bio: Angry and impulsive. The brother of Sick Ass. Carries lots of shame for hurting Humans.
entries.dialogueStyle:
Let's DO THIS THING! 
@#$%&! Emphasizes words in CAPS

entries.name: Lazy Ass
entries.bio:
A lazy donkey. Very easy going, almost surfer-esque in tone, just here for a good time. Died in the Mine collapse accident 1 year before events of the story started. Mate of Sad Ass.

She is CARE FREE.

entries.name: Miner Jenny
entries.bio: Miner in Butte Mines. She grew up in Bumpkin. She was in a relationship with Cole Butte, but dumped him after he got depressed. She is killed by Hard Ass in Ep 2 while trying to get Hard Ass to save her computer from the fire—a computer that Cole made for her.

entries.name: Mme. Derriere
entries.bio: Business mogul and entrepreneur. Biggest philanthropist. She has business ventures in science, arts, and goods. Based on her investments, she basically owns Mecha as its de facto dictator. Can shoot animals in public without repercussions. Hypercapitalist.

entries.name: Nice Ass
entries.bio: Strong and fast. She loves to plow fields all day. She's energetic, modest, helpful, pure of heart. She would never break a promise.

entries.name: Old Ass
entries.bio: Classic Marxist/Leninist leader. Inspires the heard in his lofty speeches.
entries.dialogueStyle:
"Now where was I... Right... I was lamenting the struggles of our existence."

Injustice
Protest
Politics

entries.name: Proper Ass
entries.description: Factory Donkeys (be sure to make a balance of gender between the ones marked with X)

entries.name: Radio Host Marcos
entries.bio: Radio interview for Mecha City. Enthusiastic user of Mme. Derriere's beauty products.

entries.name: Ringmaster Rico
entries.bio: The Ringmaster of the Big City Circus. He's all about bums in seats. He speaks like Job from Arrested Development.

entries.name: Sad Ass
entries.bio: Sad. Mourning his lover Lazy who died in the mines. Doesn't have direction in life anymore. He was a Mine donkey until he was sold to the Farm after Lazy died, unable to work anymore. He can be erratic and impulsive, taking out his anger on a car and accidentally starting the major fire of Ep2, or leaving the group behind in Ep5 from the Zoo.

entries.name: Sandy Butte
entries.bio: Cole's mother. Only appears in a flashback. She leaves home because of her abusive and alcoholic husband, Hugh.

entries.name: Sick Ass
entries.bio: Generally unwell from working in the mine, and later in the rain. Ends up being the chosen Vassal for the Gods to become the sacred Golden Ass.
entries.dialogueStyle:
*cough*

*cough cough*

Everyone interprets and understands the coughs - mostly yes/no answers.

entries.name: Slow Ass
entries.bio: Well-intentioned. Slow moving due to having arthritis. Timid, weary, unconfident. Looks up to Trusty.
entries.dialogueStyle:
stutters every word that has a
b-b-b
p-p-p

entries.name: Smart Ass
entries.bio: Self-centred, egotistical, strategist. Always has another backup plan. Always looking out for her own (either self or group)
entries.dialogueStyle:
"One...
Two...
Three...
Easy."
Fuck!
Can't two jennets joke around?

entries.name: Sturdy Ass
entries.bio:
Overprotective mother. She is pair-bonded with Old Ass. She lost her first daughter Lazy in the mine. She is racist against Machines. Can be overbearing a strict.

In the end, she changes her ways and spreads the story of asses.masses to other farm animals towards starting a greater revolution.

entries.name: Thirsty Ass
entries.bio: Older, a bit lecherous. Generally positive. Mostly interested in doing whatever Nice Ass is doing. Castrated. Dreams of starting a small business in the form of a Bar, called Bottom's Up
entries.dialogueStyle:
Southern drawl, Cowboy or ruralite
"Yee haw"
"Git goin'"
Puns on water

entries.name: Trusty Ass
entries.bio: First met as more of a listener than a leader, she is accepted as Old Ass's second in command. When she dies, she longs to be reassigned so that she can become a better leader.

entries.name: Zookeeper Rose
entries.bio: A Zookkeeper at the Mecha City Zoo. She is very chipper and enthusiastic about everything. But she also has no morals and makes a deal with Derriere to give the donkeys over in exchange for money to buy a new phone.
